title: Configure Terminal Appearance and Fonts
description: Set up terminal appearance: custom background color (#0D1010), foreground text (#ffffff), configure a good monospace font (SF Mono or Menlo), cursor style, and ANSI color palette that matches the Rick Terminal theme. Make these configurable.
acceptance_criteria: Text is clearly readable in theme colors
Cursor is visible and styled appropriately
ANSI colors map to theme palette
agent_output:
Terminal appearance volledig geconfigureerd met:

1. **TerminalSettings.swift** - Centralized settings manager:
   - SF Mono / Menlo font selection (default 13pt, adjustable 8-36pt)
   - Background color (#0D1010) and foreground (#FFFFFF) from Rick Terminal theme
   - ANSI color palette (16 colors) matching theme colors
   - Cursor color (green accent)
   - Font size shortcuts: Cmd+ / Cmd- / Cmd+0

2. **TerminalView.swift** - Enhanced terminal with appearance:
   - Integrated TerminalSettings
   - ANSI color configuration
   - Font rendering with SF Mono/Menlo
   - Font size keyboard shortcuts in event monitoring
   - Proper foreground/background colors

3. **RickTerminalApp.swift** - App-level integration:
   - TerminalSettings injected via @StateObject
   - View menu with font size controls
   - Settings distributed to view hierarchy

4. **ContentView.swift** - Simplified for terminal focus:
   - Using theme colors (rtBackgroundDark)
   - Ready for actual TerminalView integration
